title: My watchlist for tomorrow (TSLA / SPY / NVDA)
author: Amanda-Medina
selftext:
Keeping things simple for tomorrow.  
  
TSLA:Watching for breakout if it holds above key resistance. No rush to enter.  
  
NVDA:Looking for pullback entry instead of chasing.  
  
SPY:Main focus is overall market direction. Key level nearby.  
  
Trying to stay patient and only take clean setups.  
  
I usually write down my plan daily and review after market close.  
  
If anyone else is doing something similar, happy to exchange ideas. Just DM.
